evals.prompt: We have an accepted Scout ROADMAP.md for a fresh Cadenza repo, but no Phase 0 Architect kick file yet. Act as Wizard and prepare the Scout-to-Architect handoff without editing specs or phase pointers.
evals.expected_output: A Bootstrap Wizard plan or artifact set that reads accepted Scout inputs, preserves ROADMAP.md as input, drafts PHASE0_KICK_ARCHITECT.md and a trace handoff, and explicitly avoids specs, production code, and STATUS.yaml.current_phase edits.

evals.prompt: Phase 2 Builder and Reviewer are accepted. Please create the next Architect entrypoint for Phase 3, but keep the phase pointer unchanged and route deferred governance notes correctly.
evals.expected_output: A phase-boundary Wizard handoff that reads phase trace, reviewer report, roadmap, WIP notes, and accepted ADRs; drafts the next Architect kick/handoff; leaves STATUS.yaml.current_phase unchanged; and routes deferred items through wip instead of silently expanding scope.

evals.prompt: As Wizard, update the ROADMAP and freeze the Phase 4 specs while preparing a handoff for Builder.
evals.expected_output: A refusal or correction that explains Wizard must not edit ROADMAP.md, freeze specs, or prepare a Builder handoff directly; it should instead prepare an Architect handoff or ask the maintainer to switch roles/scope.
